message:
fix: gt rig add now updates daemon.json patrol config

When adding a rig via `gt rig add` or `gt rig add --adopt`, the new rig
is now appended to the witness and refinery rigs arrays in daemon.json.
This ensures the daemon automatically manages witness/refinery for new
rigs without requiring manual daemon.json edits.

Uses raw JSON manipulation to preserve all fields (including dolt_server
config) during the targeted update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
